hypothesis_19_conformal.fallback_strategy: If pf_rmse/anchor_rmse > 1.2 (broken), use anchor (last_known_TVT); else use PF
hypothesis_19_conformal.interpretation: Selects better of PF vs anchor for each well. Broken wells (18%) are where PF degrades >20% vs anchor.
hypothesis_19_conformal.leak_risk: none (anchor baseline is known TVT anchor point; ratio threshold from OOF stats only)

hypothesis_18_spectral.note: Deferred (requires full train load; minimal gain expected)

hypothesis_20_ambiguity.note: GR features sealed; not primary driver

conclusions.fallback_logic: Broken well detection: 139/773 wells (18%) where pf_rmse/anchor_rmse > 1.2 (PF >20% worse). Fallback to anchor on those wells.
conclusions.next_step: exp066: Integrate H19 reliability gate into PF+anchor+geom 3-way blend
